name: Nunatak
location: Nunatak in Memorial District, Tel Var lockbox merchant

bonuses.stat: On dealing Frost Damage, create a 6 meter area under the target for 6 seconds, dealing 191 Frost damage to enemies every 1 second and applying a 40% snare for 4 seconds. Enemies damaged four times become immobilized and afflicted with Major Brittle for 4 seconds, causing the target to take 20% increased Critical Damage. This effect can occur once every 15 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
